languages.text: "Гордыня — изъян, сгубивший многих мудрецов. Их знания и исследования сгинули вместе с ними. Хочешь пополнишь их ряды?"
"Pride is a flaw that has doomed many wise men. Their knowledge and research perished along with them. Do you really wish to share their fate?"
languages.original_text: "Гордыня — изъян, сгубивший многих мудрецов. Их знания и исследования сгинули вместе с ними. Хочешь пополнишь их ряды?"

traits.locale_text: "Pride is a flaw that has doomed many wise men. Their knowledge and research perished along with them. Do you really wish to share their fate?"

"Pride is a flaw that has doomed many wise men. Their knowledge and research perished along with them. Do you really wish to share their fate?"

languages.text: "Stolz ist eine Schwäche, die schon viele weise Männer zu Fall gebracht hat. Ihr Wissen und ihre Forschung ist mit ihnen gestorben. Wollt Ihr wirklich dasselbe Schicksal erleiden?"
languages.original_text: "Pride is a flaw that has doomed many wise men. Their knowledge and research perished along with them. Do you really wish to share their fate?"

traits.locale_text: "Stolz ist eine Schwäche, die schon viele weise Männer zu Fall gebracht hat. Ihr Wissen und ihre Forschung ist mit ihnen gestorben. Wollt Ihr wirklich dasselbe Schicksal erleiden?"

languages.text: « L'orgueil est un défaut qui a provoqué la chute de bien des sages. Leurs connaissances et les fruits de leurs recherches ont disparu avec eux. Voulez-vous vraiment emprunter la même voie qu'eux ? »
languages.original_text: "Pride is a flaw that has doomed many wise men. Their knowledge and research perished along with them. Do you really wish to share their fate?"

traits.locale_text: « L'orgueil est un défaut qui a provoqué la chute de bien des sages. Leurs connaissances et les fruits de leurs recherches ont disparu avec eux. Voulez-vous vraiment emprunter la même voie qu'eux ? »

languages.text: «El orgullo es un defecto que ha condenado a muchos sabios, cuyo conocimiento e investigación perecieron con ellos. ¿De verdad quiere compartir su sino?».
languages.original_text: "Pride is a flaw that has doomed many wise men. Their knowledge and research perished along with them. Do you really wish to share their fate?"

traits.locale_text: «El orgullo es un defecto que ha condenado a muchos sabios, cuyo conocimiento e investigación perecieron con ellos. ¿De verdad quiere compartir su sino?».

languages.text: "Kibir, pek çok bilge insanı felakete sürüklemiş bir kusurdur. Bilgi birikimleri ve araştırmaları da onlarla birlikte yok olmuştur. Gerçekten onların kaderini paylaşmak istiyor musun?"
languages.original_text: "Pride is a flaw that has doomed many wise men. Their knowledge and research perished along with them. Do you really wish to share their fate?"

traits.locale_text: "Kibir, pek çok bilge insanı felakete sürüklemiş bir kusurdur. Bilgi birikimleri ve araştırmaları da onlarla birlikte yok olmuştur. Gerçekten onların kaderini paylaşmak istiyor musun?"

languages.text: “傲慢毁掉了无数智者，他们的知识与研究也随之湮灭。你真的想重蹈他们的覆辙吗？”
languages.original_text: "Pride is a flaw that has doomed many wise men. Their knowledge and research perished along with them. Do you really wish to share their fate?"

traits.locale_text: “傲慢毁掉了无数智者，他们的知识与研究也随之湮灭。你真的想重蹈他们的覆辙吗？”

languages.text: 「自尊心は、多くの賢人を破滅させてきた欠点だ。彼らの知識も研究も、彼らもろとも失われた。君は本当に、彼らと同じ運命をたどりたいのか？」
languages.original_text: "Pride is a flaw that has doomed many wise men. Their knowledge and research perished along with them. Do you really wish to share their fate?"

traits.locale_text: 「自尊心は、多くの賢人を破滅させてきた欠点だ。彼らの知識も研究も、彼らもろとも失われた。君は本当に、彼らと同じ運命をたどりたいのか？」
